case_title: PRAVIN D PATEL VS. KIMBERLY RODDEN

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: MENDEZ, DAVID GERARD SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR PATEL, PRAVIN D
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RODDEN, KIMBERLY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO PLAINTIFF'S POSSESSION ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT RODDEN, KIMBERLY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, PRAVIN D AS TO DEFENDANT RODDEN, KIMBERLY SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, PRAVIN D RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODDEN, KIMBERLY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 6600 THIRD STREET, #29, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94124, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT--NO SASE, PAPERS IN DEFAULT PICK-UP BOX. (WINDOW 14).
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT RODDEN, KIMBERLY
ORIGINAL SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, PRAVIN D AS TO DEFENDANT RODDEN, KIMBERLY
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT-UNLAWFUL DETAINER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, PRAVIN D SERVED MAR-30-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODDEN, KIMBERLY
